message:
feat(engine): add universal dominance ratchet, expand semantic flattening inventory, and add 5 enrichment test suites

Source module expansions (8 modules):
- universal_dominance_ratchet.rs: +1,104 lines — new dominance ratchet
  logic for monotonic capability progression tracking
- semantic_flattening_inventory.rs: +679 lines — expanded inventory
  for semantic flattening pass evidence
- benchmark_behavior_equivalence.rs: expanded equivalence checking
- claim_publication_gate.rs: expanded gate logic
- lowering_gap_inventory.rs: refined inventory tracking
- lowering_parity_evidence.rs: refined parity evidence
- metadata_substrate_optimized.rs: expanded optimized substrate
- module_async_evaluation.rs: expanded async evaluation

New enrichment integration test suites (5 files, 2,823 lines):
- budgeted_synthesis_engine_enrichment_integration.rs (533 lines)
- category_shift_report_enrichment_integration.rs (536 lines)
- causal_intervention_dag_enrichment_integration.rs (641 lines)
- causal_regret_evidence_gate_enrichment_integration.rs (547 lines)
- causal_uplift_evidence_gate_enrichment_integration.rs (566 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
